pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the user to create the experiment file at this exact path.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to create the conditions file at this exact path.
Task description explicitly specifies the target trials should have a 20% probability.
Task description explicitly specifies the standard trials should have an 80% probability.
Task description explicitly states standard trials must use trigger code 10.
Task description explicitly states target trials must use trigger code 20.
Task description explicitly mandates setting the parallel port address to 0x0378.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create synthetic files for a PsychoPy P300 Oddball experiment. It specifically requires the creation of an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/p300_oddball.psyexp and a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/oddball_conditions.csv. Standard trials must constitute 80% of trials and trigger code 10, while target trials must be 20% and trigger code 20. The EEG trigger parallel port address must be 0x0378.
